## Description
Please describe the changes in this pull request and the rationale behind them. If it fixes an open issue, link it here (e.g. "Closes #123").

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Code style/formatting/refactoring

## Checklist
- [ ] I have run `npm run lint` and resolved any TypeScript warnings/errors.
- [ ] I have built the project locally with `npm run build` to verify there are no compilation errors.
- [ ] I have tested my changes on both desktop and mobile layouts.
- [ ] My code follows the code style and guidelines of this project.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation or code generator templates if necessary.
